metadata.task_title: Search for a product on an online store
metadata.instruction: Visit walmart.com on Chrome. Search for a frying pan, then click on the first product with a pan size of exactly 10 inches and add it to cart.
metadata.context: I've been getting into cooking recently, so I've decided to upgrade my frying pan.

tabs.title: Calphalon Classic Stainless Steel 10-Inch Fry Pan, 1891245 - Walmart.com

actions.window_title: Program Manager

focused_element.name: Google Chrome

l3.rationale: Selecting Google Chrome in the app launcher list.

l4.rationale: Launch Google Chrome from the application launcher.

l5.rationale: Covers the initial application/web navigation needed to reach Walmart before searching, including opening webpages and moving to the site link.
